title: No Infinite Effects in Hud
description: Disables infinite effects display in the hud.
body:
This mod **No Infinite Effects in Hud** (also known as Nieih) is a client mod. You can use it in client, and it will do nothing in the server.

## ⭐ What will this mod do?

This mod will disable the display of some status effects in the upper right corner of the main hud.

Whether the status effects are disabled depends on their duration and user configuration.
By default, this mod will only disable all status effects with infinite duration. You can choose whether to disable status effects with non infinite duration, enable effects with infinite duration, or disable the entire mod. These configurations are modifiable in the game.

## 📞 Contact

You can join our QQ group 108917413 for supports.

Due to the author's location, there is no contact information available for non Chinese regions.
